ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., PM2.5, CO, O3) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the pollutant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Common sources of the pollutant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pollutant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pollutant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the index was measured */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the air quality index */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant measured */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this index is based on */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the air quality index record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the air quality index record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES air_quality_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the air quality level (e.g., Good, Moderate, Satisfactory) */,
  "min_index_value" REAL /* Minimum index value for the level */,
  "max_index_value" REAL /* Maximum index value for the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the air quality level */,
  "health_advice" TEXT /* Health advice for the air quality level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the air quality level record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the air quality level record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monitoring station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monitoring station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the reading was taken */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was taken */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the time of the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the reading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality index that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message sent in the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., sent, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES air_quality_indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant the recommendation is for */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "implementation_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of implementing the recommendation */,
  "implementation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in days for implementing the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
